requirement: [Memory Transfer (Host ↔ Device)] Achieve at least 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth for DMA transfers

test_cases.description: Validate memory transfer bandwidth is below 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth for DMA transfers
preconditions: System with GPU and appropriate drivers installed
steps: Initiate a memory transfer from host to device
Calculate the percentage of theoretical PCIe bandwidth achieved
test_cases.expected_result: Memory transfer bandwidth should be below 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth

test_cases.description: Validate memory transfer bandwidth is above 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth for DMA transfers
preconditions: System with GPU and appropriate drivers installed
steps: Initiate a memory transfer from host to device
Calculate the percentage of theoretical PCIe bandwidth achieved
test_cases.expected_result: Memory transfer bandwidth should be above 90% of theoretical PCIe bandwidth

test_cases.description: Validate memory transfer bandwidth for a very small data size
preconditions: System with GPU and appropriate drivers installed
steps: Initiate a memory transfer with a very small data size from host to device
test_cases.expected_result: Memory transfer bandwidth should be accurately measured for small data sizes

test_cases.description: Validate memory transfer bandwidth for a very large data size
preconditions: System with GPU and appropriate drivers installed
steps: Initiate a memory transfer with a very large data size from host to device
test_cases.expected_result: Memory transfer bandwidth should be accurately measured for large data sizes

test_cases.description: Validate memory transfer bandwidth while other processes are running
preconditions: System with GPU and appropriate drivers installed
steps: Initiate a memory transfer from host to device while other processes are running
test_cases.expected_result: Memory transfer bandwidth should be stable and unaffected by other processes
